# Finca la Querencia — Long-Term Rentals in Monteverde, Costa Rica

Working dairy, coffee, and vegetable farm in San Luis de Monteverde (Puntarenas, Costa Rica)
offering three furnished houses for long-term rent. Six-month minimum, one year preferred.
Formerly top-rated Airbnbs (4.95 average, 74 reviews), now long-term only.

## The houses
- The Lilly Pad — ₡390,000/month. Light-filled cottage, queen bed in sleeping loft, beside a fish pond. Sleeps 1–2.
- La Casita — ₡250,000/month. The original farmhouse, one bedroom, covered porch.
- La Quinta Querencia — ₡365,000/month. Family compound (La Casita + Bunkhouse cabin), sleeps up to 6.

## Included in every rental
Water, electricity, Starlink high-speed internet, bi-weekly housekeeping, fully furnished.
Farm amenities: huge organic garden, spring-fed swimming pond, wood-fired hot tub, community rancho.
Farm dairy, eggs, and Pueblo Chico coffee (pueblochicocoffee.com) usually available for purchase.

## Location
San Luis de Monteverde — 15–20 minutes by car from Monteverde Centro and Santa Elena
on the newly paved main road (La Trocha). 9 minutes from the CIEE Monteverde campus.
A vehicle is recommended, ideally AWD.

## Contact
WhatsApp: +506 8372-3431 or +506 8370-4014 · Email: murthantim@gmail.com
Website: https://www.querenciahomestead.com (Spanish: /alquileres.html)
